content:
back in march, i thought of writing morimens fanfics, so now i decided to write one! friendly reminder that i'm still new to doing stuff like this, so if there's something that i can improve on my writing please don't hesitate to ask~

my first fic called "I Was Blind", which features my own interpretation on Aigis and Jenkin's friendship, is published! check it out:

https://archiveofourown.org/works/65492080
tysm will ^^ i'll consider writing more when i have time
